title: Page 101 speech — Jun 7 2020 (Mandarin practice fragment)
html:
1:25 voice memo at 1AM Jun 7 2020 — Yahir says "I'm doing the page 101 speech" then recites in Mandarin. Likely osu mandarin 3 / Chinese-textbook recitation practice from covid pandemic era sophomore year, several months before the shanghai study abroad arc opens. Body untranscribed from Mandarin; preserved as a node in the language-practice cluster.

mandarin 3 · osu · shanghai study abroad · china chapter · covid pandemic era
